event_device: You find an ancient Zoidian device half-buried in the rubble.
event_device_ambush: The device emits a sound that is attracting nearby Zoids. Prepare to fight!
event_device_reward: This must be worth a fortune!
event_creature: A small metallic creature emerges from the shadows, too small to be a Zoid...
event_creature_heal: The creature shyly approaches your Zoids and emanates a light that begins to repair them.
